title: The Pirate of the Black Hawk
writer: Sergio Grieco, Enzo Alfonsi, Mario Caiano
actors: Gérard Landry, Pina Bottin, Andrea Aureli
plot: Manfred, backed by Saracen pirates, deposes the Duke of Montfort, takes over the throne and kidnapped the Duke's young son. Capt. Riccardo, the leader of a pirate band on the ship Black Hawk, sets out to defeat Manfred and his Sar...
